summary: Iteration 220: Frontend-only testing for two bug fixes. Fix 1: Akita breed products no longer appear in Birthday Box Browse Drawer for Bruno (Labrador) across all 5 tabs (Cakes, Toys & Joy, Style, Memory, Wellness). Fix 2: Cake/birthday-cake products no longer appear on Care page. Both fixes verified passing. Birthday Box drawer header correctly shows 'For Bruno' (not 'your pet').
critical_code_review_comments: BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer.jsx line 167: filterBreedProducts applied to masterProducts correctly — breed-specific products (Akita) are filtered out for Bruno (Labrador). Logic confirmed working.
CareMobilePage.jsx line 124: excludeCakeProducts() is called before filterBreedProducts() — cake products correctly excluded from Care pillar.
useMiraFilter.js CAKE_CATEGORY_KEYS set includes 'breed-cakes', 'birthday-cakes', 'dognuts' etc — broad enough to catch all cake categories.
CelebrateMobilePage.jsx handleOpenBrowseDrawer useCallback has [currentPet] dep — pet data is always fresh when drawer opens.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (5/5 Birthday Box tabs Akita-free, Care page cake-free, grooming products present)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 220 verified: (1) Birthday Box Browse Drawer for Bruno (Labrador) — all 5 tabs (Cakes, Toys & Joy, Style, Memory, Wellness) show ZERO Akita products; (2) Care page (/care) — zero cake products in product grid, correct grooming/wellness/care products present; (3) Drawer header correctly shows 'For Bruno — browse and swap Mira's picks'. Both Fix 1 and Fix 2 are working correctly. Mobile viewport 390x844 used. Login as dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123.

birthday_box_drawer_akita_check.style_tab: PASS — no Akita products (products: Paw Protector Boots, Birthday Bandana, Birthday Bow Collection etc.)
birthday_box_drawer_akita_check.memory_tab: PASS — no Akita products (products: Birthday Memory Book, Birthday Memory Scrapbook Kit etc.)
birthday_box_drawer_akita_check.wellness_tab: PASS — no Akita products (products: Birthday Probiotic Powder, Birthday Wellness Bundle etc.)

test_results_detail.birthday_box_header: PASS — shows 'For Bruno — browse and swap Mira's picks'
test_results_detail.care_page_no_cakes: PASS — 0 cake-related products found in Care page product grid
test_results_detail.care_page_sub_categories: PASS — no cake sub-categories in filter pills (shows: Accessories, Breed Collection, Shampoo & Conditioner, Topical Care, Wellness Gifts, Coat Oils, Grooming, Care Essentials)
test_results_detail.care_page_products_present: PASS — 29 care/grooming related products found (Calm It Vetiver Oil, Aloe & Neem Shampoo, etc.)

fix1_akita_birthday_box.root_cause: BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer previously only applied filterBreedProducts when petBreed was truthy. Products fetched via breed-API could include Akita items for any pet. Fix: filterBreedProducts now ALWAYS applied to both masterProducts and breed-API results.

fix2_cakes_care_page.root_cause: Care page fetched pillar=care products without excluding cake categories. Breed-cake/birthday-cake products tagged with pillar=care were showing up.
fix2_cakes_care_page.fix_location: CareMobilePage.jsx line 124 — excludeCakeProducts() called before filterBreedProducts()
